ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Default shipping address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "po_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number associated with the order */,
  "sales_order_number" TEXT /* Sales order number associated with the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen by the customer */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "total_with_tax" REAL /* Total order value including tax */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who created the shipping address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address for shipping */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for shipping */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for shipping */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code for shipping */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (billing/shipping) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shipping address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shipping address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product being ordered */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory record */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
